data.description: Astrotech Corporation (ASTC) is down 15.4% today. Here is some analysis on what might have caused this price movement.Analysis: The most likely catalyst is dilution concerns after Astrotech disclosed a new at-the-market (ATM) equity program that allows the company to sell shares into the market over time.
